title: carex lutea
intro: Carex lutea, also known as the yellow sedge, is a perennial plant native to North America, characterized by its bright yellow flowers and flat, linear leaves. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Carex lutea include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve digestion, as well as its ability to boost the immune system and protect against infections. Carex lutea can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being and support the body's natural healing processes.
